name: Qwen Study Pack
description: Root ZIP preset for summaries, flashcards, and tiny offline note workflows.
corpus: study packs work best when the notes are short specific and focused on one class
offline studying can be calmer because the browser is not reaching out to a remote api
zip model packs are useful because the app can point to root files or import them manually
small local assistants are good at summarizing your own notes and making quick quizzes

summarize: Short version: keep the key facts, remove fluff, and write in review language.
quiz: Turn each important note into one direct question and one short answer.
study: This root ZIP study preset is best when paired with a tiny class-specific corpus.
